get.summary: Get current admin user info (test endpoint)
Get all conversations for the authenticated user
Get a specific conversation by ID

post.summary: Update the timestamp of a conversation

get.summary: Get all messages in a conversation

post.summary: Add a message to a conversation

get.summary: Get all qualifications for the authenticated user
Get a specific qualification by ID

post.summary: Create multiple qualifications from a list of names

get.summary: Get all questions for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves all questions for the authenticated user with optional filtering by category and active status

post.description: Creates a new question for the authenticated user

get.summary: Get a specific question by ID
get.description: Retrieves a single question by its ID if the user is authorized

put.description: Updates an existing question if the user is authorized

delete.description: Soft deletes a question by setting IsActive to false

post.summary: Create multiple questions in a batch
post.description: Creates multiple questions for the authenticated user in a single transaction

put.summary: Update multiple questions in a batch
put.description: Updates multiple questions in a single transaction

delete.summary: Remove category from all questions that reference it
delete.description: Removes the category ID and name from all questions that reference the specified category

delete.summary: Remove qualification from all questions that reference it
delete.description: Removes the qualification ID and name from all questions that reference the specified qualification

get.summary: Get the active randomization session for the authenticated user

post.summary: Clear the current question from the randomization session

get.summary: Get all selected categories for a randomization session

post.summary: Add a category to the selected categories list

delete.summary: Remove a category from the selected categories list

get.summary: Get all used questions for a randomization session

post.summary: Add a question to the used questions list

delete.summary: Remove a question from the used questions list

put.summary: Update category information for used questions

get.summary: Get all postponed questions for a randomization session

post.summary: Add a question to the postponed questions list

delete.summary: Remove a question from the postponed questions list

put.summary: Update the timestamp of a postponed question
